stops.extraction_target: the founding/establishment year in the infobox (field: 'Founded')
stops.reasoning: Seed: TSMC is the central actor — the world's largest contract semiconductor foundry — so start by extracting where its operations and HQ are located.

stops.extraction_target: Look up the elevation at Taipei[[b]](#cite_note-4) 25°04′N 121°31′E﻿ / ﻿25.067°N 121.517°E﻿ / 25.067; 121.517
the number of service branches listed in the Service branches section
stops.reasoning: Examine U.S. military posture and strategic role in the Indo-Pacific — relevant to security of semiconductor supply lines and deterrence around Taiwan.

stops.extraction_target: Reason: the number of 1-bits in its binary representation
the number of subsections listed under Personnel in the Contents (including Uniforms and its nested subsections)
stops.reasoning: Close with a focused page on the US Navy to highlight maritime security and protection of shipping lanes that carry critical semiconductor materials and finished products.

riddle:
1. Seek the page titled TSMC (the semiconductor foundry headquartered on the island whose largest city and seat of government is Taipei) and ask: in what year was this company established? After you note that year, follow the link on the page labeled with the adjectival form for the inhabitants of the East Asian island whose largest city and seat of government is Taipei to reach the country's article.

2. There exists a page describing the island nation in East Asia you just opened; on that page determine the elevation, in meters, of the capital located at 25.067°N, 121.517°E (the figure is the ground height above sea level).

3. What count appears in the section that enumerates the nation's military components — how many service branches are listed there? Once recorded, use the link labeled "Article" on that page to jump to the entry about the combined U.S. forces' components for the next step.

4. If you convert the whole number you obtained in clue 3 into base two, how many 1-bits appear in that binary representation? Treat the count from clue 3 as the value to transform.

5. The article whose opening line names the maritime service branch of the U.S. contains your next tally: in the Contents, under the entry covering personnel, how many subsections are listed (count "Uniforms" and any nested sub-items as separate entries)?

6. The ledger requests one final arithmetic: compute abs((clue 1 + clue 2) - clue 3) % 10 and report the result; this final value is a single digit between 0 and 9.

metadata.theme: Tracing the geopolitics and market dynamics around TSMC: from Taiwan's demographics and regional logistics to U.S. military posture and competitor market signals.
